channel.title: pages on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in pages on Tech Tracker

item.title: Jio pages - made in India browser from reliance.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-LJi-UJgkpuY/X5Drf2aYN2I/AAAAAAAAB34/mPteVmyY-qk35NP-Om4p5H_pvgBE0C93QCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1603332988271326-0.png" alt=""> Aatma nirbhar bharat working very well, the self reliance not only on products but digital to.. the indian government banned many chinese apps due to privacy & data breach issues. India have lack of world class apps to become self reliant India should be self reliant in all the factors in digital technology either apps or any software etc. To tackle this issue, pm modi launched Aatma nirbhar bharat scheme that help Indian devs & promote them, many developers got profited today developers started using made in India titles to get popularity & audience.
